creator: bert@stanzabird.nl
text: Oh cool, I also wanted to make updates to librewolf happen, but I'm unsure of what state the port is in. If there is something I can do to contribute, I'd be happy to do so. I also created a bug report, but this one is newer, [#272941](https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=272941).
